data.title: Trump Vs. Harris: Vice President Hangs Onto Slender Lead But Ex-President Improves His Position As Better Economic Steward
data.description: Vice President Harris' lead over Trump is within the margin of error of a survey, which makes the race a closely-fought one.

data.title: Equinox Gold Shares Dip, Lowers Guidance For Greenstone Mine Production Outlook
data.description: Greg Smith, CEO of Equinox Gold, praised the Greenstone Mine for demonstrating progress with both mining and processing rates increasing substantially.

data.title: ShiftPixy's Big AI Move: Supercharges Workforce Management With $150M TurboScale Deal
data.description: ShiftPixy stock surged after announcing its $150 million acquisition of TurboScale, enhancing its AI capabilities.PIXY

data.title: SelectQuote Shares Surge After Healthcare Platform Confirms $100M Securitization Deal
data.description: SelectQuote wants to reduce a portion of its outstanding term debt, as the new securitization offers a significantly lower cost of capital.

data.title: Crypto Venture Capital Activity Slows As Early-Stage Investments Dominate In Q3
data.description: Galaxy Research‘s latest report shows a continuing cooldown in crypto venture capital activity for Q3, in light of Bitcoin‘s (CRYPTO: BTC) range-bound trading below
